# Data Model Checklist: Precompute Grid-Level Features

**Purpose**: Ensure entities cover grid records and job metadata.
**Created**: 2026-03-11
**Feature**: `specs/030-precompute-grid-features/spec.md`

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/prompts:speckit.checklist` workflow.

## Core Entities

- [x] CHK-DM-002 Job metadata captures status, timestamps, and warnings.
- [x] CHK-DM-003 Dataset versions are recorded with grid records.
